mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_id NOT IN (SELECT member_id FROM admin_detail)

SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'MM')) AS month, NVL(SUM(pay_amount), 0) AS amount FROM payment WHERE TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND pay_status = 'PAID' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(pay_date, 'MM')
SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(refund_at, 'MM')) AS month, NVL(SUM(refund_amount), 0) AS amount FROM refund WHERE TO_CHAR(refund_at, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') GROUP BY TO_CHAR(refund_at, 'MM')
SELECT MOD(TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(created_at, 'D')) + 5, 7) AS day_index, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM reservation WHERE created_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 7 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(created_at, 'D')

SELECT h.hour_val AS hour, NVL(m.cnt, 0) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT LEVEL - 1 AS hour_val FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 24 ) h LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(last_login, 'HH24')) AS hour_val, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM member WHERE last_login IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TO_CHAR(last_login, 'HH24') ) m ON h.hour_val = m.hour_val ORDER BY h.hour_val

SELECT '#' || r.res_no AS resNo, g.name AS guestName, s.space_name AS spaceName, TO_CHAR(r.res_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || LPAD(r.start_time, 2, '0') || ':00' AS resDate, CASE r.status WHEN 'RESERVED' THEN '예약완료' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN '취소됨' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '이용완료' WHEN 'NOSHOW' THEN '노쇼' WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '보류중' ELSE r.status END AS status, CASE r.status WHEN 'RESERVED' THEN 'status-reserved' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN 'status-cancelled' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN 'status-completed' WHEN 'PENDING' THEN 'status-pending' ELSE 'status-default' END AS statusColor FROM reservation r JOIN guest_detail g ON r.guest_id = g.member_id JOIN space_unit su ON r.unit_no = su.unit_no JOIN space s ON su.space_no = s.space_no ORDER BY r.res_no DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
